name: Triangle
description_short: Triangle Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit credit union based in Nashua, NH offering deposit accounts, lending products, and business services to the community.
description_long:
Triangle Credit Union operates as a traditional credit union serving the Nashua, New Hampshire area and surrounding communities. The organization emphasizes its core values of Community, Diversity, and Service, positioning itself as a member-focused financial institution rather than a for-profit bank.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including deposit accounts (savings, checking, certificates, and IRAs), personal lending (personal loans, auto loans, RV loans, mortgages, and home equity lines of credit), credit cards, and business banking services. They provide online and mobile banking platforms, a payment system called TCUGo Services, and 24/7 member support. Their business lending division emphasizes helping small businesses grow through various lending products and cash management services.

Triangle distinguishes itself through several community-focused initiatives including TCU University (educational content via blog, podcast, and YouTube), financial literacy course catalogs, community events and workshops, and employer group programs. The credit union maintains multiple physical branches with posted hours and ATM networks, and offers appointment scheduling for personalized service. They advertise competitive rates across products, currently showing auto refinancing as low as 4.99% APR and mortgage rates starting at 6.456% APR.

As a credit union, Triangle is NCUA-insured rather than FDIC-insured, and member deposits are protected up to $250,000. The organization underwent a core system conversion during April 30-May 4, indicating active technology modernization. While the website demonstrates a full-service financial institution with legitimate products and services, detailed information about membership requirements, eligibility criteria, and fee structures is limited to what's publicly displayed.
services: Credit cards (Membership Rewards VISA from 15.50% APR)
Business lending and cash management services
Online banking and mobile banking with LoanPay payment system
pros: 24/7 member support available via phone (603-889-2470 / 800-276-2470) and secure email for account access, payments, and fraud assistance
Competitive auto refinancing rates as low as 4.99% APR and mortgage rates from 6.456% APR
Multiple contact methods including branch locations, Audio Response Assistant (TARA) phone system, and mail address for accessibility
Comprehensive product range including personal loans, auto/RV/mortgage lending, business accounts, and wealth management services
Educational resources through TCU University including blog, podcast, YouTube channel, and financial literacy courses
Online banking platform with LoanPay for one-time and automatic loan payments
Community-focused initiatives including employer group programs and financial planning services
cons: Limited public information about membership eligibility requirements and whether the credit union is open to all or restricted to specific employer/community groups
No details provided on deposit fees, transaction fees, minimum balance requirements, or other account costs
Website does not disclose APR ranges or terms for most loan products beyond auto and mortgage examples
No information about credit score requirements, approval rates, or lending eligibility criteria
Scheduled system downtime (April 30-May 4) indicates potential service disruptions during core conversion
best_for: Members seeking competitive auto refinancing and mortgage rates through a community-focused financial institution
Businesses needing business checking, lending, and cash management services from a credit union partner
Consumers interested in financial education through TCU University resources and community workshops
Individuals valuing 24/7 support and multiple contact channels for account management and fraud assistance
diagnosis: Triangle Credit Union is best for members seeking a community-oriented credit union with competitive lending rates, comprehensive financial products, and strong customer support. The main caveat is that detailed information about membership eligibility, fee structures, and specific loan terms beyond advertised examples is not publicly available on their website, requiring direct contact with the credit union to determine fit.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Triangle — Credit Union in Columbus, MS | CreditDoc
meta_description: Triangle — NCUA-insured credit union in Columbus, MS. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
